regime_read: NQ leading / pulling away from ES — narrow, tech/AI-driven, FRAGILE. Trust directional moves less; watch for reversal when AI names cool.
narrative:
PRE-US-OPEN BRIEFING — ES/NQ (research only; no execution path on these via OANDA). All times approximate.

1) RECENT MOVE-BY-MOVE READ
Both indices are pressing fresh highs into the close of the prior session. NQ (+0.61% on the day, +2.26% on the week) printed a new prior-day AND prior-week high at 30,693 and is now trading above it at ~30,752 — clean breakout behavior. ES (+0.17% day, +1.18% week) is the laggard, sitting at 7,626, BELOW its prior-day/prior-week high of 7,632.25 — it has NOT confirmed NQ's breakout. That gap is the whole story: tech is doing the heavy lifting while the broad index hesitates. Catalyst-wise the tape is noisy: geopolitics dominates the headlines (oil holding gains, a reported Israel/Hezbollah ceasefire claim juxtaposed against fresh Iran-related war confusion, plus a combative Trump/Netanyahu story) — that 'war confusion' is exactly the kind of thing that slipped US futures intraday. Layer on a bond-market inflation warning and a soft labor undertone ('sector growth without job growth'). Net: risk-on price action led by AI/tech, but the macro backdrop underneath it is unsettled, not clean.

2) VOLUME-PROFILE READ (where volume traded — NOT order-flow delta; respect that)
This is volume-at-price, not aggression. ES: POC 7,595.16, value area 7,582.93–7,625.75, with a thick high-volume shelf clustered 7,582–7,598. ES is currently trading right at the TOP edge of its value area (7,625.75) and just under the prior high — that is the line in the sand for ES. NQ: POC 30,399.72, value area 30,302.65–30,666.65, high-volume nodes stacked 30,302–30,424. NQ at ~30,752 is trading ABOVE its entire 5-day value area — price has left the accumulation zone to the upside, which is breakout-confirming for NQ but also means there is little traded volume directly beneath it to cushion a pullback; the air pocket back to the VAH (30,666) and then VWAP (30,612) is where a fade would accelerate. Accumulation zone = the POC shelves listed above; those are where price would need to revert to find real support.

3) NQ/ES LEAD-LAG REGIME — CONCENTRATION (size/trust implication)
The system flags CONCENTRATION: NQ is pulling away from ES (cumulative return spread +4.93%, 1d spread +0.439%), contemporaneous correlation high at 0.912, but the lead-lag matrix shows no durable leader (best lag −1 at only 0.066 vs 0.862 contemporaneous; leader = NONE). Translation: the two move together intraday, but the WIDENING spread means breadth is narrowing — this is a tech/AI-driven, FRAGILE advance, not a broad-based one. RSI confirms the stretch: NQ RSI 75 (overbought), ES RSI 70.2 (overbought). CONCENTRATION regimes say: trust directional follow-through LESS, respect reversal risk when AI names cool, and SIZE DOWN. The fact that ES has NOT confirmed NQ's new high is a textbook non-confirmation warning inside this regime.

4) EVENT-CALENDAR AWARENESS
Nonfarm Payrolls in ~3 days (2026-06-05, 8:30 ET) — high-impact; widen stops / cut size into it (and note the soft-labor news angle makes this a live catalyst). CPI ~10 days out (06-12), FOMC ~15 days out (06-17). NFP is the near-term gravity well: do NOT carry oversized overbought-breakout longs into a payrolls print. Cadence dates are estimates, not verified releases — treat as approximate.

5) SYNTHESIS — META-REGIME + NARROWED BIAS
Meta-regime: a stretched, overbought, CONCENTRATION-driven uptrend (both well above 200-SMA: ES +11%, NQ +20%) led by tech, with ES non-confirmation and a messy geopolitical/inflation news backdrop. The trend is up and structurally intact above the 200-SMA, but the quality of this leg is low: narrow, overbought, and into NFP. That keeps me modestly LONG-biased with the trend but with LOW conviction — this is intelligence, not an edge, and this scorecard has zero settled calls, so humility is mandatory.

BIAS: long-with-trend but reduced-trust, ~52%, valid only while NQ holds above session VWAP 30,612.5; invalidated below 30,612.5 (loss of VWAP opens the air pocket back to VAH 30,666 already broken and then POC shelf 30,400). A clean reclaim and ES confirming above 7,632.25 would upgrade conviction; failure of NQ at VWAP plus ES rejecting its prior high would flip this toward a fade-the-overbought stance. Confidence is deliberately capped in the low-50s: news is mixed (geopolitics unresolved, inflation/labor warnings) AND the lead-lag is concentrated/fragile rather than clean — both conditions argue against high confidence. Size down into NFP regardless of direction.
